mapper.sql: SELECT b.*, c.full_name AS customer_name, p.full_name AS photographer_name, s.name AS service_name FROM bookings b JOIN users c ON b.customer_id = c.id LEFT JOIN users p ON b.photographer_id = p.id JOIN services s ON b.service_id = s.id
mapper.select: ORDER BY b.booking_date DESC, b.start_time DESC
WHERE b.customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY b.booking_date DESC
WHERE b.photographer_id = #{photographerId} ORDER BY b.booking_date DESC
WHERE b.status = #{status} ORDER BY b.booking_date DESC
WHERE b.booking_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY b.booking_date, b.start_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bookings (customer_id, photographer_id, service_id, booking_date, start_time, end_time, status, location, notes, total_price) VALUES (#{customerId}, #{photographerId}, #{serviceId}, #{bookingDate}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{status}, #{location}, #{notes}, #{totalPrice})
mapper.update: UPDATE bookings SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
